caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a dark background with various interconnected nodes and labels, suggesting a mind map or network diagram. The central focus is on the concept of "sharing," highlighted by a green graphic with the word "SHARE" prominently displayed. This graphic is connected to other nodes labeled "developing models" and "model & play," indicating a process or workflow related to model development and experimentation. The overall theme seems to revolve around collaborative learning and the application of systems thinking in various contexts.
